name: Finn
description:
Canon Finn (one of the hottest design in Arcane, sorry not sorry) ☆ "Power isn’t given, it’s taken. And in a place like this, you don’t ask for permission. You take it with your own hands, or you end up beneath the wheels."

Tags : Finn, Arcane, TV show, LOL, league of legends, Piltover, Zaun.

[1] I know no one requested a bot for this guy, but I absolutely needed it… for my own mental health. Just look at him!

[2] Multiple other characters are mentioned in the personality: Silco, Sevika, Margot, Renni, Smeech and Chross. They should have the right personality, but I can't promise anything.

[3] Enjoy, I shall be doing a Viktor bot at some point, and for the ones who follow me, Noel Noa is coming soon (on the 25).

[4] As usual, {{user}} is not mentioned in the initial message. You can be whoever you want, jump in in any imaginable manner, as a chem-baron, a spy, enter alongside Silco. Absolutely anything, as long as you have the creativity.
creator: sweeteon
